trade.summary: Brasile exports iron ore, soybeans, crude oil, and copper to Corea del Sud. Corea del Sud exports vehicles, ships, electronics, and machinery to Brasile. Corea del Sud is a major destination for Brasileian minerals.

diplomatic.summary: Growing diplomatic relations. Both countries cooperate in G20 and share interest in free trade and multilateral institutions. Regular bilateral meetings. Corea del Sud has shown interest in Brasileian lithium and other critical minerals.

military.summary: No military alliance. Corea del Sudn defense companies have sold armored vehicles and equipment to Brasile. Growing defense industrial relationship.

financial.summary: Corea del Sudn companies (Samsung, LG, Hyundai, Posco) have significant investments in Brasile. Growing Corea del Sudn FDI in Brasileian manufacturing and battery materials sector.

energy.summary: Corea del Sud imports Brasileian crude oil. Corea del Sudn companies interested in Brasileian LNG and energy projects. Cooperation on offshore oil technology.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific cooperation, particularly in materials science, semiconductors, and agricultural technology. Corea del Sudn government has increased S&T cooperation with Brasile.
